narrative: Hot US PPI and import price data drive a dollar rally as KC Fed Schmid warns inflation remains the pressing risk—DXY +0.25%; gold lower -0.53%; equities +0.92%; VIX 17.9. USD/JPY firms to 158.12 on a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage, though a strong -1.69 25d RR put skew signals heavy hedging for a potential downside reversal. AUD/JPY bilateral divergence (1.16% G8 spread) reflects AUD outperformance (+0.62% avg) against JPY weakness (-0.54% avg) as RBA-BoJ 360bp carry persists. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
